name: Bhai Inderjit Singh Sajan
body: Bhai Inderjit Singh Ji was born into the home of Giani Surat Singh Sajan and Mata Kulwant Kaur on the 3rd of October 1965 in the village of Changali Kadim, Punjab. He grew up in a household of Kirtanis and Kathakars, therefore he received his initial training from his father, Giani Surat Singh Ji and his paternal grandfather, Bhai Dhara Singh Ji. He was also sent to Prof. Labh Singh and Bhai Bachan Singh from Hadiabad to learn the finer intricacies of music. He formed a jatha with Bhai Onkar Singh on the side harmonium and his own brother, Bhai Gurmeet Singh provided accompaniment on tabla. Their newly formed jatha performed in various parts of India including Indore, Jabalpur, Durg and many more. They were also employed in Gurdwara Sees Ganj Sahib, Delhi for some time and then at Urban Estate, Jalandhar. Subsequently, they became attached to Nanaksar with the blessings of Sant Lakha Singh Ji. This gave them the opportunity to travel abroad to Malaysia, Singapore and Dubai. Currently, Bhai Inderjit Singh Ji lives with his family in Ferozepur.
